ci_support_linux_64_r_base4.4.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cran_mirror:
- https://cran.r-project.org
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  r-base:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
r_base:
- '4.4'
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.summary: A set of Analysis Data Model (ADaM) datasets constructed using the Study Data Tabulation Model (SDTM) datasets contained in the 'pharmaversesdtm' package and the template scripts from the 'admiral' family of packages. ADaM dataset specifications are described in the CDISC ADaM implementation guide, accessible by creating a free account on <https://www.cdisc.org/>.

A set of Analysis Data Model (ADaM) datasets constructed using the Study Data Tabulation Model (SDTM) datasets contained in the 'pharmaversesdtm' package and the template scripts from the 'admiral' family of packages. ADaM dataset specifications are described in the CDISC ADaM implementation guide, accessible by creating a free account on <https://www.cdisc.org/>.

name: r-pharmaverseadam
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set version = "1.3.0" %}
{% set posix = 'm2-' if win else '' %}

package:
  name: r-pharmaverseadam
  version: {{ version|replace("-", "_") }}

source:
  url:
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/pharmaverseadam_{{ version }}.tar.gz
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/Archive/pharmaverseadam/pharmaverseadam_{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 830af5868a5a622b11b5f38d2becc6da9e6ecd6dbca2a7638018c2eec86c8a4e

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic
  rpaths:
    - lib/R/lib/
    - lib/
  missing_dso_whitelist:
    - '*/R.dll'        # [win]
    - '*/Rblas.dll'    # [win]
    - '*/Rlapack.dll'  # [win]

requirements:
  build:
    - {{ posix }}zip               # [win]
    - cross-r-base {{ r_base }}    # [build_platform != target_platform]
  host:
    - r-base
    - r-tibble
  run:
    - r-base
    - r-tibble

test:
  commands:
    - $R -e "library('pharmaverseadam')"           # [not win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"library('pharmaverseadam')\""  # [win]

about:
  home: https://pharmaverse.github.io/pharmaverseadam/, https://github.com/pharmaverse/pharmaverseadam/
  license: Apache-2.0
  summary: A set of Analysis Data Model (ADaM) datasets constructed using the Study Data Tabulation Model (SDTM) datasets contained in the 'pharmaversesdtm' package and the template scripts from the 'admiral' family of packages. ADaM dataset specifications are described in the CDISC ADaM implementation guide, 
    accessible by creating a free account on <https://www.cdisc.org/>.
  license_family: APACHE
  license_file:
    - LICENSE-2.0.txt

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - conda-forge/r
